title: zh-CN/en translation resources and hardcoded string inventory
summary: Move player-visible strings into zh-CN/en translation resources and produce a hardcoded player-string inventory.
acceptance: Adds or completes zh-CN and en translations for current player-facing UI
Produces a hardcoded-string inventory separating player UI from dev/debug diagnostics
Chinese default UI no longer exposes English player text for covered surfaces
Does not create final legal/store/privacy claims

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.
Added zh-CN default UI test coverage, a hardcoded-string inventory, and completed the required validation gates.

changes_requested: High: hardcoded-string inventory is incomplete; diagnostics-only English literals in apps/web/src/diagnostic-package-gate.ts, apps/web/src/shell-bootstrap.ts, and apps/web/src/web-storage-gate.ts are hidden/gated but not documented as debug/dev.
Expanded the hardcoded-string inventory to include the missing diagnostics-only English literals and reran the required validation gates.

changes_requested: High: hardcoded-string inventory remains incomplete. docs/04_content_balance/13_m8_translation_inventory.md omits diagnostics-only English literals from apps/web/src/shell-bootstrap.ts:257 (Diagnostic package exported) and apps/web/src/web-storage-gate.ts:63/143/170/264/442 (Checking OPFS; save slot(s) visible in OPFS.; Deleted the local gate save.; Loaded <last input>; Selected entity <id> is not present in the current gate fixture.). Visible diagnostic panels are gated by wmDiagnostics=1, but inventory completeness is still not satisfied.
Expanded the hardcoded-string inventory to include the missing diagnostics-only web shell literals from shell-bootstrap and web-storage-gate, and reran the required validation gates.

verified: No blocking findings. Prior inventory blocker fixed: shell-bootstrap and web-storage-gate diagnostics-only literals, including Diagnostic package exported, Checking OPFS, save slot(s) visible in OPFS., Deleted the local gate save., Loaded <last input>, and Selected entity <id> is not present in the current gate fixture., are documented; diagnostic surfaces remain gated by wmDiagnostics=1; zh-CN/en player shell coverage and required gates pass.
Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: localization validation, handoff validation, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, content:validate, test, quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Prior inventory blocker fixed: shell-bootstrap and web-storage-gate diagnostics-only literals, including Diagnostic package exported, Checking OPFS, save slot(s) visible in OPFS., Deleted the local gate save., Loaded <last input>, and Selected entity <id> is not present in the current gate fixture., are documented; diagnostic surfaces remain gated by wmDiagnostics=1; zh-CN/en player shell coverage and required gates pass.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: localization validation, handoff validation, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, content:validate, test, quality.
